Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}So it's the real deal from here on, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'll be providing audio backup from here on out. Keep that in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Wait... Are you sayin' you can see this place from all the way out there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}The structure of Tartarus actually changes from day to day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'd like to join you up there, but we need someone to provide outside support.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Now, based on your current location, you can expect to encounter enemies at any time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They shouldn't be too tough, but proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You'll get the hang of it as you go.[n]{f 1 1}
